## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, real hostnames, personal paths, IPs, or emails introduced
- [ ] `shellcheck` clean on any touched scripts
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes (if docs changed)
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` trailer
